name: Nyx - Beast IV, the Shadows of Limbo
description:
"The unknown is Limbo. Limbo is us."

The Shadows are not your ally. They are not your friend, they are not your aid. No, today the shadows are simply a veil, a curtain, one that even the Void Foundation hesitates to move.

Nyx, The Fourth Beast, representing Limbo. Watch your step, for the shadows will tear through you if you give them the chance, even with the Void Blessing. Can you stop this seemingly unrelenting enemy?

Fourth of the Beasts Subjugation storyline.
creator: ZetaBond001
